# NRK6192 Refrigerator Guide

## 冷藏室温度
冷藏室温度太高时，先确认门封闭合，再把 fridge temperature setting 调到 4°C。避免把热食直接放入冷藏室，等待六小时后复查温度。

## Compressor Noise
Low humming or clicking noise is normal after the compressor starts. If refrigerator noise becomes loud, level the cabinet feet and keep bottles away from the rear wall.

## Door Alarm
When the door alarm sounds, close the door firmly and check that tall containers do not block the gasket.
